name: Tuna-Casserole Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté onion, pepper, and celery in 4 tablespoons butter.
3. Stir in soup and milk, and cook over low heat for 10 to 12 minutes.
4. Add mushrooms, salt, stuffed olives, and tuna.
5. Pour mixture into a 2-quart casserole.
6. Melt 4 tablespoons butter; stir in corn flakes and almonds.
7. Spread on top of the casserole.
8. Bake, uncovered, for 25 minutes.
